category_sources: source_facts.description says Official GitLab CI runner; official GitLab Docs says GitLab Runner works with GitLab CI/CD to run jobs in a pipeline.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gitlab-runner; official GitLab Docs and project title use GitLab Runner.
docs_sources: Official GitLab Docs provides the dedicated GitLab Runner documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-runner, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitLab Docs describe executing GitLab CI/CD jobs.
